SIMPLE  =                    T                                                  BITPIX  =                   16                                                  NAXIS   =                    0                                                  CRVAL1  =              10.6848                                                  CRVAL2  =              41.2690                                                  CDELT1  =         -0.000291667                                                  CDELT2  =          0.000291667                                                  CROTA2  =                 12.3                                                  COMMENT ASTAP-CLI mock_astap test double                                        END
